title: Abyssal Wynn
body:
### External downloads for the best experince

Add [Voices of Wynn](https://voicesofwynn.com/) _Not included because of the download size_

Distant horizons LOD data _Soon_ _not includeded because of the download size_

This is mostly QOL mods with a lot removed from the standard pack and a few added as they are not needed for wynncraft

### MAJOR NOTE
If you plan on using shaders go to the distant horizons config and disable rendering

### Credits of resource packs used
[Wynnpack Overlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynnpack-overlay-stone-tablet-theme.)

[Wynncraft: Fables & Legends](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynncraft-fables-legends)

_Abyssal Wynn is a fork of my abyssal optimized pack ment for the wynncraft server._
